targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active FROM crawl_source WHERE active = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM crawl_source
SELECT COUNT(*) AS today FROM crawl_log WHERE crawled_at >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', crawled_at) AS time, SUM(items_extracted) AS items FROM crawl_log WHERE crawled_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT cs.name, COUNT(cl.id) FILTER (WHERE cl.status_code >= 400 OR cl.error_message IS NOT NULL) AS errors, COUNT(cl.id) AS total FROM crawl_source cs LEFT JOIN crawl_log cl ON cl.source_id = cs.id GROUP BY cs.id, cs.name ORDER BY errors DESC

SELECT cs.name, cs.source_type, cs.active, cs.last_crawl, COUNT(cl.id) AS total_crawls, COALESCE(SUM(cl.items_extracted), 0) AS items FROM crawl_source cs LEFT JOIN crawl_log cl ON cl.source_id = cs.id GROUP BY cs.id, cs.name, cs.source_type, cs.active, cs.last_crawl ORDER BY cs.name
